channel.title: Design on Elise Volkman
channel.description: Recent content in Design on Elise Volkman

item.title: The Editor Has Graduated
item.description: I have wanted a Bachelor’s degree since the day my mother told me she wished she’d finished her post-secondary education. Nine years and three post-secondary schools later, I have what I wanted. (To see what I’ve been up to in my classes, check out my design portfolio.) I finished the last two classes of my Bachelor’s degree in August 2025. I won’t walk the stage, but I will mark the moment, in my own way, with my own people.

item.title: The Handwritten Letters: May 2026
item.description: dear you, I hope I find you in a comfy chair with a warm cup in your hands. My tea is steeping on the counter, and I popped a piece of bread in the toaster oven because I should probably eat something (but remembering to feed myself can be hard for me). How are you? What has life brought you today? It’s been a while since I last wrote. I’ve had a lot… Well, I’ve had just as much going on as I usually do, but I’ll get into that another day.
